nasb.text: Therefore, thus says the Lord God to them, “Behold, I, even I, will judge between the fat sheep and the lean sheep.

esv.text: “Therefore, thus says the Lord God to them: Behold, I, I myself will judge between the fat sheep and the lean sheep.

cnv.text: “‘因此，主耶和華對牠們這樣說：看哪！我必親自在肥羊與瘦羊之間施行審判。

ccb.text: “‘所以主耶和华对他们说，看啊，我要亲自在肥羊和瘦羊之间施行审判。
